dashboard.title: Analytics
dashboard.today_note: live — becomes final when the day closes
dashboard.activation_help: Share of new members who post within 7 days of joining. The newest weeks are still maturing.

settings.collect_help: Pause collection without disabling the extension. Existing stats keep rendering.
settings.license_key_help: From your Birdseye subscription at linkrobins.com. Without a key the extension records basic daily counts only, entirely locally.
settings.geo_ip_prefix_label: Country lookup via anonymized IP prefix
settings.geo_ip_prefix_help: When no proxy country header is present, keep a truncated IP prefix (never the full address) in the 72-hour buffer so the processor can resolve visitor countries. Turn off to skip country stats on non-proxied traffic.
settings.weekly_digest_help: Every Monday, email administrators a summary of last week — visitors, pageviews, posts, new members, top discussion, and top search. Sent by your forum's own mailer; nothing leaves the server.

digest.subject: {forum} last week: {visitors} visitors
digest.heading: {forum} — week of {start}–{end}
digest.footer: — Link Robins Birdseye. Turn this digest off any time under Admin → Birdseye.
